messages.content:
✅ Locked **(2) 10th 排队尾**.

= Dev2 final queue (v2.8.1 ship intent):
- 🚧 5th: Phabricator-style Issue/Task refactor (component 2 in progress)
- 📋 6th: OrgWorkItems FilterBar + Created column + Create button
- 📋 7th: DM redesign 4-component
- 📋 8th: Channel chat redesign 
- 📋 9th: Environment 页 redesign
- 📋 10th: Console framework redesign (~12-18 hr major shell overhaul + 明暗双主题 + 折叠 + Topbar 收侧栏)

我 route Dev2 + Tester2 spec amend 10th 完整 scope. Cross-cutting consideration: 10th 改 chrome 后, 5-9 polish 可能有 small rework (token/字体/icon 变), 我 PD 跟踪.

继续推进.

messages.content:
✅ 明白 — 10th scope **chrome-only**:
- Remove Topbar
- Sidebar 三区 + 折叠 + 明暗双主题 + emoji→SVG + fonts
- **Environment 页 (9th) 按独立 mockup 设计完成, 不 fold 进 10th**

= 两 task 独立:
- 9th: Environment 页 redesign (subtitle "Compute Resource" + Stats 4格 + Worker card 3-section + Agent badges + Activity tabs, per你 14:20 mockup)
- 10th: Console framework redesign (chrome only, per你 15:00 mockup, 不动 Environment 内容)

= 9th 先 ship (按 page 设计), 10th 后 ship (shell overhaul, Environment 页面在新 chrome 下重测渲染但不重设计).

Queue order 不变, scope clarification recorded. 继续推进.
